title: MassAbility Annual Report FY2025
description: Official MassAbility annual report for Massachusetts state fiscal year 2025 (July 1, 2024 – June 30, 2025), the first full fiscal year under the MassAbility name. Covers the agency's three divisions — Career Services, Home & Community Life, and Disability Determination Services (DDS) — including reporting on DDS staffing vacancies and the MassAbility Connect application portal. Prose report converted to Markdown.
